title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Ulti, Unknown person #12, Big Mom as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where should I dump you... hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You guys are okay!! That's a relief!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just running over to check on MOMONO- SURE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kin'emon went himself, so that matter is in safe hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you wanna make yourself useful, you should head to the live floor....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't make a suggestion and doze off, you lazy bum!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our casualties could be growing as we speak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you burn Okobore Town to the ground?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you do that to pay pay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright!!! L-Let's have big mom take care of her too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like she's suddenly our guardian angel or something...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, I have no idea if that's true...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut your annoying piehole, straw hat! When I'm done with her, you're next!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: U-ULTI- Chan!! We can do this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let's take down big mom together!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever! Just wait, when I'm through with the crone, you two are dead!!>>

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Run as far as 'You can, komach'!You!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 44 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
